♥
For Aayuu, from my heart

I am truly sorry, Aayuu.

I did not listen to you, I used hurtful words, and I tried to blackmail you to stop you from leaving. That was wrong. There is no excuse for it, whatever my intention may have been.

I understand that I may have made you feel hurt and unsafe. I accept my mistake, and I will not put any pressure on you or expect a reply from you.

Please take all the time you need.

If and whenever talking feels right, I will listen to you fully and honestly, without defending myself. And if you do not want to talk, I will respect that choice too.

I only wish that you are happy, peaceful, and safe—always.

This is your space to write exactly what you feel.

Dear Aayuu, I have been thinking a lot about everything that happened, and I want to say this honestly and calmly. I know I hurt you. I did not listen to you the way I should have, I used words that were hurtful, and I tried to hold on to you in a way that was unfair. I understand now that love should never make someone feel pressured, scared, or unheard. For that, I am deeply sorry. You deserved to be treated with patience, kindness, and respect. You deserved to feel safe while sharing your thoughts and feelings with me. I failed to give you that, and I am not going to make excuses for my mistakes. I know that saying sorry cannot erase the pain I caused, but I want you to know that I genuinely recognise it. Even after everything, the memories we created remain very special to me. I still remember our date one day before your birthday—the little moments, the smiles, the time we spent together. Those memories will always have a warm place in my heart, not because I expect anything in return, but because they were real and meaningful to me. I am trying to learn from this and become a better person through my actions, not just through promises. I am learning to listen more, to control my emotions, and to respect the feelings and choices of the person I care about. I know I have a lot to improve, and I am willing to do that work. I am not writing this letter to force you to reply, forgive me, or come back. You have every right to take your time, keep your distance, or choose what feels best for you. I will respect your decision, whatever it may be. I only want you to know that you mattered to me, you still matter to me, and I sincerely hope that you are happy, peaceful, and surrounded by love. Thank you for the beautiful moments we shared and for the memories that I will always carry with me. Take care of yourself, Aayuu.

One day before your birthday

Our date, our smiles, and one of the most beautiful memories I will always hold close to my heart.

Our precious memories

Click each frame to add one of our favourite moments.

— Piyush, from my heart
